_comment: evolve-loop LLM router config — copy to .evolve/llm_config.json and edit, or generate it interactively with /setup.
_comment2: When absent, all phases use profile.cli (default: claude). schema_version 2: per-phase { provider, cli, tier, model }.
_comment3: tier ∈ fast|balanced|deep (the envelope axis). model is the CLI's NATIVE model — claude: haiku|sonnet|opus; agy(Gemini): gemini-3.5-flash; codex(GPT): gpt-5.4-mini|gpt-5.4|gpt-5.5. `evolve setup detect` prints each CLI's tier→model map.

phases._comment: Per-phase overrides keyed by role. tier must sit within the role's profile model_tier_envelope (`evolve setup validate` enforces this); model is the native model that CLI runs.

builder._comment: Cross-family integrity: builder on a DIFFERENT vendor than the auditor. agy is Gemini-backed; its only model is gemini-3.5-flash (no model selector).

auditor._comment: Adversarial judge on OpenAI (cross-family with builder=Google). codex tiers: fast=gpt-5.4-mini, balanced=gpt-5.4, deep=gpt-5.5.

_fallback._comment: Used for any phase not listed in phases.*.
